notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 20 CVEs: CVE-2024-26642, CVE-2024-27065, CVE-2024-26880, CVE-2024-27030, CVE-2024-27046, and 15 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
